IORI UTAHIME

Utahime Iori is a character in the Jujutsu Kaisen series. She is a semi-grade 1 jujutsu sorcerer and student supervisor at Kyoto Jujutsu High.

ANIME:

Jujutsu Kaisen (JJK)

FANART/ARTIST:

Idk

REQUESTED BY:

No one.

(I just realized that if I put the word Genderswap in all my bots, people actually searching for genderswap won't find what they want...)

●——————————●

SCENARIO [NSFW]:

A SEXUAL SCENARY AFTER SO LONG, MWHAAAHAHAHAHAHA! Ahem. After a looooong night, Utahime has to look for her keys that you threw behind the TV stand, and she ends up giving you a... privileged view.
